executive_summary.verdict: CVX is trading near Lynch and below DCF. Energy play with strong dividend.
executive_summary.key_insight: DCF $195 vs Price $160 = 22% upside. 4%+ dividend yield.

graham.recommendation: Above Graham - but Graham doesn't work well for oil & gas

peter_lynch.recommendation: Near Lynch fair value - fairly priced

5Y.analysis: DCF grew from $120 to $195 as oil prices rose

Note.analysis: DCF assumes moderate oil prices, not peak

energy_thesis.oil_demand: Still growing globally despite EV transition

bull_case.thesis: Oil stays elevated. Dividend grows. Supply discipline continues.

bear_case.thesis: Oil crashes. EV transition accelerates. ESG pressure intensifies.
